records.content_snippet:
tools:
  web_search:
    allowed_agents: [researcher]
    approval_level: none
    rate_limit_per_hour: 100
    sandbox_required: false

  browser_automation:
    allowed_agents: [researcher]
    approval_level: none
    rate_limit_per_hour: 20
    sandbox_required: true
    network: restricted

  document_parser:
    allowed_agents: [researcher, memory_agent, reporter]
    approval_level: none
    sandbox_required: false

  file_read:
    allowed_agents: [planner, researcher, creator, visual, critic, memory_agent, executor, watchdog, auditor, interacter, reporter]
    approval_level: none

  file_write:
    allowed_agents:
      researcher: research_output/
      creator: drafts/
      visual: assets/visuals/
      memory_agent: memory/
      executor: output/
      auditor: audit/
      reporter: reports/
    approval_level: auditor

  code_execution:
    allowed_agents: [researcher, visual]
    approval_level: none
    sandbox_required: true
    network: none
    timeout_seconds: 60
    memory_limit_mb: 512

  image_generation:
    allowed_agents: [visual]
    approval_level: auto
    cost_per_call_usd: 0.04

  social_apis:
    allowed_agents: [executor]
    approval_level: user
    requires_auditor_token: true

  email:
    allowed_agents: [executor]
    approval_level: user
    requires_auditor_token: true

  calendar:
    read_agents: [planner, watchdog, interacter, reporter]
    write_agents: [executor, interacter]
    approval_level_write: auditor
